name: Construction & Home Calculators
description: Free construction calculators for concrete, roofing, flooring, paint, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and cost estimates across every major home trade.
metaTitle: Construction Calculators — Free Online Tools for Every Trade
metaDescription: 80 free construction calculators: roofing, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, remodeling costs, energy upgrades & material estimates for 2025-2026.

subcategories.name: Materials & Exterior
subcategories.description: Calculate concrete yardage, roofing squares, paint gallons, board feet, fence posts, drywall sheets, and exterior replacement costs. Free material quantity and cost estimators.

subcategories.name: Landscaping & Outdoor
subcategories.description: Calculate material quantities and costs for landscaping, patios, and outdoor living projects.

subcategories.name: Remodeling & Interior
subcategories.description: Estimate kitchen, bathroom, painting, and interior remodel costs by fixture quality, materials, and scope of work.

subcategories.name: Measurement & Sizing
subcategories.description: Square footage, area calculations, roof pitch, stair dimensions, and HVAC sizing tools.

subcategories.name: HVAC & Climate
subcategories.description: Estimate HVAC replacement, heat pump, mini-split, and ductwork installation costs with regional labor pricing.

subcategories.name: Electrical
subcategories.description: Calculate electrical panel upgrade, EV charger installation, and other electrical project costs.

subcategories.name: Plumbing
subcategories.description: Estimate water heater, sump pump, and whole-house repipe costs with installation labor.

subcategories.name: Foundation & Structural
subcategories.description: Calculate foundation repair, basement waterproofing, and crawl space encapsulation costs.
